# Generated by openai (gpt-3.5-turbo)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for our complete application stack (VPC, EC2, RDS, S3, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure components. We'll add CloudWatch alarms and detailed monitoring after we deploy and verify the basic setup works.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: "CloudFormation template for complete application stack"

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: "AWS::EC2::VPC"
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: "10.0.0.0/16"
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: "Name"
          Value: "MyVPC"

  InternetGateway:
    Type: "AWS::EC2::InternetGateway"

  AttachGateway:
    Type: "AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment"
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  Subnet:
    Type: "AWS::EC2::Subnet"
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: "10.0.1.0/24"
      AvailabilityZone: "us-east-1a"
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true

  RouteTable:
    Type: "AWS::EC2::RouteTable"
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC

  SubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: "AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation"
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref Subnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTable

  InternetRoute:
    Type: "AWS::EC2::Route"
    DependsOn: AttachGateway
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: "0.0.0.0/0"
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  EC2Instance:
    Type: "AWS::EC2::Instance"
    Properties:
      InstanceType: "t2.micro"
      ImageId: "ami-0c55b159cbfafe1f0"
      SubnetId: !Ref Subnet

  DBSubnetGroup:
    Type: "AWS::RDS::DBSubnetGroup"
    Properties:
      DBSubnetGroupDescription: "Subnet group for RDS"
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref Subnet

  DBInstance:
    Type: "AWS::RDS::DBInstance"
    Properties:
      DBName: "MyDatabase"
      DBInstanceClass: "db.t2.micro"
      Engine: "mysql"
      EngineVersion: "5.7"
      DBSubnetGroup: !Ref DBSubnetGroup

  MyBucket:
    Type: "AWS::S3::Bucket"

  LoadBalancer:
    Type: "AWS::ElasticLoadBalancing::LoadBalancer"
    Properties:
      Subnets:
        - !Ref Subnet
      SecurityGroups:
        - !Ref LoadBalancerSecurityGroup
      LoadBalancerName: "MyLoadBalancer"

  LoadBalancerSecurityGroup:
    Type: "AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup"
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: "Security group for Load Balancer"
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: "tcp"
          FromPort: "80"
          ToPort: "80"
          CidrIp: "0.0.0.0/0"
